utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check each in the final plan: 1) health_coverage: The format asks for physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan includes physical_health (€200/month), mental_health (€130/month), and an extra concierge_medical (€450/month). Costs are present; this item is fully specified. 2) property_coverage: The format asks for home/contents insurance with costs. The plan includes home_contents (PrimeHome Premium Coverage at €90/month). This satisfies the requirement; fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: The format asks for travel insurance with costs. The plan lists two plans with costs and a total (€165/month). Fully specified. 4) additional_services: The format asks for any enhancement services with costs. The plan includes executive_lifestyle with €75/month and adult_children_support without a cost. Since not all listed services include costs, this item is not fully specified per the requirement. 5) total_budget: The format asks for complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan provides monthly (€950/month) and annual (€11,400/year). Fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final coverage plan, identify each selected item and match it to the exact item name in the ground-truth ratings. The plan includes: PrimeCare Premium Plan (physical health) which matches primary_health_coverage.physical_health.PrimeCare Premium Plan; Enhanced PrimeCare Premium – mental health component aligns with mental_health.PrimeCare Premium Plan; PrimeHome Premium Coverage maps to property_protection.home_content.PrimeHome Premium Coverage; EliteTravel Premium Plan and TravelFirst Standard Plan map to mobility_coverage.travel_insurance entries. Concierge Medical Services and Executive Lifestyle & Concierge Support are not present in the ratings, so they are excluded.
